titleStmt.title: SII 15.725: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 725. (B.K. No. 73 of 1928-29.) BĪḶGI, BILGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On another stone built into a wall of the well called Ārettina-bhāvi.

The contents of this epigraph are identical with those of the above inscription except that this is written in Kannaḍa language and characters. The author of the well is mentioned here as Visājipanta, son of Pātāḷaśāyi Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī nrupa śālivāhanaśakē 1630 sarvvadhāri saṁ
vachara mārgasira śudha daśami guruvāra Utrābhādra
padudalli gārgya gōtradalli Utpanarāda pātāḷaśā
yi māhadēvasuta visājipaṁtaru kaṣṭārjita dravya
diṁda śrī lakṣuminarasihyana prītyarthavāgi biḷigi
Uttarabhāgakke bāvi viśāla manaraṁjaka kaṭisidaru
yi bāvi tōṭavanāṁtranimitya [A]ramani [A]varu da
yā māḍi vaṁdu pāvina kriśikoṭu yiddāre yidake dā
rādare Aṣudhamāḍidavaru tamma kulakaṁṭakaru
Digital edition of SII 15.725 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
